name: 12pk Tealight Ashwood and Palo Santo Candle - Threshold™: Votive-Style, 4hr Burn Time
description:
Cozy up your indoor and outdoor spaces instantly with this 12-Pack of Tealight Ashwood and Palo Santo Candles from Threshold™. Great for everyday use or special occasions, this pack of tealights in an earthy brown hue brings warm style to any space. These small candles feature the intoxicating scents of ashwood and palo santo along with notes of patchouli and oakwood to help you create a lovely ambiance, and each one burns for up to 4 hours.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
